items.title: This has to be one of the most disappointing games in Nets summer league history. Played all their guys with a playoff spot on the line and they've mostly been quite bad. The Alpharetta Unicorn Bruce Thornton has been too much for them to handle.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Bob Thornton. UC Irvine F was drafted 87th in 84 by NY. Bench guy for NY. PHI & UTA from 85-92 before going to Italy. Randomly returned to NBA in 95-96 for WAS for 7 gms. Per bio "Rough, Tough banger....knew what he had to do to stay in league and did it."
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Bob Thornton. UC Irvine F was drafted 87th in 84 by NY. Bench guy for NY. PHI & UTA from 85-92 before going to Italy. Randomly returned to NBA in 95-96 for WAS for 7 gms. Per bio "Rough, Tough banger....knew what he had to do to stay in league and did it."

items.title: The Houston Rockets signed Bruce Thornton to a four-year, $9.3 million deal, which includes one season fully guaranteed, league sources told HoopsHype. Thornton was the 31st pick of the 2026 NBA Draft and was a three-time All-Big Ten Team selection.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Houston Rockets signed Bruce Thornton to a four-year, $9.3 million deal, which includes one season fully guaranteed, league sources told HoopsHype. Thornton was the 31st pick of the 2026 NBA Draft and was a three-time All-Big Ten Team selection.

items.title: Bulls should trade up in the second round tonight. Three targets: Bruce Thornton, Meleek Thomas, and Henri Veesaar. I'd put Isaiah Evans fourth. Bryson inherited a ton of seconds from AK's trade deadline purge. This is what they're for. Go get a third contributor from this draft.
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt: Bulls should trade up in the second round tonight. Three targets: Bruce Thornton, Meleek Thomas, and Henri Veesaar. I'd put Isaiah Evans fourth. Bryson inherited a ton of seconds from AK's trade deadline purge. This is what they're for. Go get a third contributor from this draft.

items.title: My guys in this draft: Cam Boozer, Kingston Flemings, Dailyn Swain, Jayden Quaintance, Henri Veesar, Richie Saunders, Bruce Thornton
items.author: Steph Noh
items.body_excerpt:
My guys in this draft: Cam Boozer, Kingston Flemings, Dailyn Swain, Jayden Quaintance, Henri Veesar, Richie Saunders, Bruce Thornton

Guys I'm fading: Aday Mara (think he'll be fine but overdrafted), Karim Lopez, Nate Ament, Chris Cenac, Koa Peat
